content.rendered:
Understand the rules, rights, and responsibilities governing the use of the Attendo platform for your organization and employees.

Suggested Content Outline (Tailored to Attendo):

  • Acceptance: By using the system (Web or Mobile App), users agree to the terms.
  • User Roles: Clearly define responsibilities for Admin, HR, and Staff roles.
  • License: Grant of a non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the software for workforce management.
  • Restrictions: Prohibition on reverse engineering or sharing account credentials (essential since you have “Credential” management features).
  • Termination: Rights to terminate access for violation of policies (e.g., attempting to spoof GPS).
